rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Motion And Motion To Seal Court Records
rulings.Rulings: The motion to seal court records is denied. None of the interests identified by Ann Cazahous override the public's constitutionally-protected right of access to court records. Any party choosing to contest the tentative must notify the Court and opposing counsel no later than March 15, 2016, at 4:00 p.m.
